columns.extraction_plan: The PDF mentions 'median treatment duration' on page 4 and page 11 (e.g., 'median treatment duration in ARASENS was 41 months for darolutamide plus ADT and docetaxel versus 34.1 months in the docetaxel subgroup of the abiraterone group in PEACE-1'), but it does not explicitly state the 'Median Follow-Up Duration (mo)' for the ARASENS trial. I have reviewed the abstract, methods, results, and discussion sections, as well as all tables and figures (Tables 1, 2, 3, 4, A1 and Figures 1, 2, 3, A1) on pages 1-18, but this specific metric is not reported.
